name: Credit Recovery Group, Inc
description_short: Credit Recovery Group, Inc is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 4.6/5 with 27 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Recovery Group, Inc is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. Carrying a 4.6/5.0 Google rating from 27 reviews, Credit Recovery Group, Inc has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Houston area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit reporting agency, financial consultant, Credit Recovery Group, Inc provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Recovery Group, Inc operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Credit Recovery Group, Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
